{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer",
  "description": "TMC Renovation Project is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	The Civil Engineer responsible for planning, designing, supervising, and managing construction projects from inception to completion, ensuring that all works are executed in accordance with approved designs, safety standards, quality requirements, and project timelines. Proper documentation and reporting are crucial.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and manage day-to-day site construction activities.
	Draft engineering drawings, specifications, and project plans.
	Ensure construction works comply with approved designs, standards, and regulations.
	Prepare project schedules, work programs, and progress reports.
	Conduct site inspections and quality control checks on materials and workmanship.
	Coordinate withother stakeholders.
	Monitor project progress and ensure timely delivery within budget.
	Identify, report andresolve technical and site-related challenges.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental standards on site.
	Prepare technical documentation, reports, and as-built drawings where required.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or related discipline.
	2&ndash;6 years of relevant experience in construction or infrastructure projects.
	Strong knowledge of structural design, construction methods, and site supervision.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, or similar tools is an advantage.
	Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.


Professional Certification (Required):


	Should be registered with the Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria (COREN) as a Professional Engineer or be in the process of obtaining registration.
	Membership of the Nigerian Society of Engineers (NSE) will be an advantage.
	Additional certifications in project management, health &amp; safety (e.g., HSE certifications) will be an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: projtmc@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-20",
  "employmentType": "Contract",

  },

Civil Engineer Job at TMC Renovation Project




        
    

        
        TMC Renovation Project is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	The Civil Engineer responsible for planning, designing, supervising, and managing construction projects from inception to completion, ensuring that all works are executed in accordance with approved designs, safety standards, quality requirements, and project timelines. Proper documentation and reporting are crucial.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise and manage day-to-day site construction activities.
	Draft engineering drawings, specifications, and project plans.
	Ensure construction works comply with approved designs, standards, and regulations.
	Prepare project schedules, work programs, and progress reports.
	Conduct site inspections and quality control checks on materials and workmanship.
	Coordinate withother stakeholders.
	Monitor project progress and ensure timely delivery within budget.
	Identify, report andresolve technical and site-related challenges.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental standards on site.
	Prepare technical documentation, reports, and as-built drawings where required.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or related discipline.
	2–6 years of relevant experience in construction or infrastructure projects.
	Strong knowledge of structural design, construction methods, and site supervision.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, Civil 3D, or similar tools is an advantage.
	Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.


Professional Certification (Required):


	Should be registered with the Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria (COREN) as a Professional Engineer or be in the process of obtaining registration.
	Membership of the Nigerian Society of Engineers (NSE) will be an advantage.
	Additional certifications in project management, health & safety (e.g., HSE certifications) will be an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Design Bricks Homes &amp; Property is a Nigerian real estate company focused on land sales, housing, property management, and real estate advisory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Egbeda, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Secretary in Egbeda Lagos to provide administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth operation of the office.
	The ideal candidate will manage correspondence, schedule appointments, maintain records, and support management with daily administrative tasks.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / BSc Business Administration, Secretariat studies or a related field
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong organizational and time management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Professional appearance and conduct.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Basic record-keeping and document management skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrifeoluwa@designbricksproperty.com.ng using &quot;Secretary&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Secretary Job at Design Bricks Homes & Property




        
    

        
        Design Bricks Homes & Property is a Nigerian real estate company focused on land sales, housing, property management, and real estate advisory services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Egbeda, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Secretary in Egbeda Lagos to provide administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth operation of the office.
	The ideal candidate will manage correspondence, schedule appointments, maintain records, and support management with daily administrative tasks.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / BSc Business Administration, Secretariat studies or a related field
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong organizational and time management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Professional appearance and conduct.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Basic record-keeping and document management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Secretary" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.

At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and accounting documents.
	Record daily financial transactions and update accounting systems.
	Prepare bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable.
	Support budget preparation and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant financial regulations.
	Assist with internal and external audits.
	Prepare payroll information and statutory remittances where required.
	Maintain confidentiality of financial information.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	3&ndash;6 years of accounting experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax requirements.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ATS (or currently pursuing one).
	Experience working with accounting software such as Sage, QuickBooks, or Tally.


Skills:


	Financial reporting
	Bookkeeping
	Bank reconciliation
	Budgeting and forecasting
	Data analysis
	Time management
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: lifewayuniquehomes@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Account Officer Job at Lifeway Unique Homes




        
    

        
        Lifeway Unique Homes is a leading real estate and property development company based in Lagos State, Nigeria. We specialize in real estate development, property investment, property consultancy, and the construction of high-quality residential and commercial properties.

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we help individuals and businesses achieve their property ownership and investment goals. Our services range from developing modern housing projects and providing strategic property investment solutions to building bespoke homes for private clients.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At Lifeway Unique Homes, we are passionate about creating sustainable developments, delivering exceptional value, and transforming communities through quality real estate solutions. As a growing organization, we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and rewarding work environment where talented individuals can build successful careers and make a meaningful impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial records and accounting documents.
	Record daily financial transactions and update accounting systems.
	Prepare bank reconciliations and monitor cash flow.
	Process invoices, payments, receipts, and expense claims.
	Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.
	Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable.
	Support budget preparation and financial forecasting.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant financial regulations.
	Assist with internal and external audits.
	Prepare payroll information and statutory remittances where required.
	Maintain confidentiality of financial information.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	3–6 years of accounting experience.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax requirements.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification such as ICAN, ACCA, or ATS (or currently pursuing one).
	Experience working with accounting software such as Sage, QuickBooks, or Tally.


Skills:


	Financial reporting
	Bookkeeping
	Bank reconciliation
	Budgeting and forecasting
	Data analysis
	Time management
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant (Generalist)",
  "description": "Codelabprojects is an AI-first technology and services company delivering intelligent and scalable solutions across multiple sectors. Our capabilities span Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Software-as-a-Service (SaaS), Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS), Data-as-a-Service (DaaS), energy solutions, and AI-enabled operational systems.

We focus on building innovative digital products, optimizing business operations through technology, and enabling organizations to leverage artificial intelligence, data, and modern digital platforms to operate more efficiently and competitively.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant (Generalist)

Job Location: Sabon-Lugbe, Airport Road - Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a highly resourceful, tech-savvy, and self-motivated Executive Assistant / Business Generalist to provide high-level support across multiple departments.
	This is a dynamic, cross-functional role for an individual who can think critically, conduct in-depth research, manage data, and coordinate operations effectively.
	The ideal candidate will be comfortable working across operations, strategy, technology, and administrative functions, supporting leadership and driving execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide executive-level support, including scheduling, coordination, and task management.
	Conduct in-depth research, data gathering, and analysis to support business decisions.
	Assist in cross-departmental coordination, ensuring alignment across teams and projects.
	Support operations across multiple units including tech, marketing, and business development.
	Manage and organize data, reports, and documentation for strategic use.
	Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across various projects.
	Assist in developing process improvements and operational efficiency initiatives.
	Prepare presentations, reports, and briefs for internal and external stakeholders.
	Support leadership in executing strategic initiatives and special projects.
	Adapt quickly to different roles and responsibilities as business needs evolve.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering or Computer Science (Minimum: 2:1 or First Class).
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong analytical and research skills with attention to detail.
	High level of tech proficiency and ability to quickly learn new tools and systems.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and coordination skills.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	Experience with data handling, reporting, and problem-solving.
	Proven ability to function across multiple departments effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Resourcefulness and initiative
	Critical thinking and problem-solving
	Strong data and analytical mindset
	Adaptability and flexibility
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.


Salary
N250,000/month (Gross) + Performance Bonuses &amp; Perks.

Benefits:


	Exposure to high-level business operations and strategy
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing, technology-driven environment
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@codelabprojects.com using &quot;Executive Assistant / Business Generalist &ndash; Precise Location in Abuja as the subject of the email.

Note: This is a fully on-site role in Abuja. Only candidates residing within Lugbe, Airport Road, Galadimawa, or nearby areas will be considered.",

Executive Assistant (Generalist) Job at CodeLabProjects Group(CLP)




        
    

        
        Codelabprojects is an AI-first technology and services company delivering intelligent and scalable solutions across multiple sectors. Our capabilities span Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Software-as-a-Service (SaaS), Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS), Data-as-a-Service (DaaS), energy solutions, and AI-enabled operational systems.

We focus on building innovative digital products, optimizing business operations through technology, and enabling organizations to leverage artificial intelligence, data, and modern digital platforms to operate more efficiently and competitively.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant (Generalist)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Sabon-Lugbe, Airport Road - Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a highly resourceful, tech-savvy, and self-motivated Executive Assistant / Business Generalist to provide high-level support across multiple departments.
	This is a dynamic, cross-functional role for an individual who can think critically, conduct in-depth research, manage data, and coordinate operations effectively.
	The ideal candidate will be comfortable working across operations, strategy, technology, and administrative functions, supporting leadership and driving execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide executive-level support, including scheduling, coordination, and task management.
	Conduct in-depth research, data gathering, and analysis to support business decisions.
	Assist in cross-departmental coordination, ensuring alignment across teams and projects.
	Support operations across multiple units including tech, marketing, and business development.
	Manage and organize data, reports, and documentation for strategic use.
	Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across various projects.
	Assist in developing process improvements and operational efficiency initiatives.
	Prepare presentations, reports, and briefs for internal and external stakeholders.
	Support leadership in executing strategic initiatives and special projects.
	Adapt quickly to different roles and responsibilities as business needs evolve.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering or Computer Science (Minimum: 2:1 or First Class).
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong analytical and research skills with attention to detail.
	High level of tech proficiency and ability to quickly learn new tools and systems.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and coordination skills.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	Experience with data handling, reporting, and problem-solving.
	Proven ability to function across multiple departments effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Resourcefulness and initiative
	Critical thinking and problem-solving
	Strong data and analytical mindset
	Adaptability and flexibility
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.


Salary
N250,000/month (Gross) + Performance Bonuses & Perks.

Benefits:


	Exposure to high-level business operations and strategy
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing, technology-driven environment
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Executive Assistant / Business Generalist – Precise Location in Abuja as the subject of the email.

Note: This is a fully on-site role in Abuja. Only candidates residing within Lugbe, Airport Road, Galadimawa, or nearby areas will be considered.
